description_long: This is a classic white station wagon-style sedan with a boxy, elongated body and a flat roof, reminiscent of mid-20th-century American cars. The vehicle features four doors, chrome trim along the sides, and blacked-out windows, giving it a vintage yet practical appearance. The front end is characterized by a wide chrome grille, dual round headlights with yellow-tinted inner lamps, and a subtle hood ornament. The rear showcases a large window, chrome bumper, and tail lights integrated into the bodywork. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design and chrome hubcaps, adding a touch of sportiness. The overall finish is glossy, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal surface texture.
description: A classic white, boxy station wagon sedan with chrome trim, blacked-out windows, and multi-spoke black wheels. Features a wide chrome grille, dual round headlights, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, chrome trim, four doors, and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, chrome bumper, and tail lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the boxy profile and chrome details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide chrome grille, dual round headlights, and hood ornament.
attribute_license_plate: Front and rear license plates visible; white background with red text, front plate reads 'CALIFORNIA'.
attribute_wheel_design: Black wheels with multi-spoke design and chrome hubcaps.
